text: The average American household lost 39% of their net worth between 2007 and 2010.
57% of Americans had no emergency fund in 2008.
A person who invested {{your_cash}} in March 2009 would have grown it materially by 2024—the figure seeds from your cash variable.
Most people learned what a mortgage-backed security was only after losing money because of one.
JP Morgan acquired Bear Stearns for $2 per share. One year earlier the stock traded at $172. People who understood what this meant acted within hours.
body: JP Morgan acquired Bear Stearns for $2 per share. One year earlier the stock traded at $172. People who understood what this meant acted within hours.

text: The Fed opened the year still cutting rates as housing stress spread through credit markets.
body: The Fed opened the year still cutting rates as housing stress spread through credit markets.
